server.name: HYDRA
server.description: 402-native paid work engine for agents. Web extraction, search, regulatory intelligence, prediction market signals, oracle data. 25 paid tools from $0.001 USDC.

tools.name: scrape_url
tools.description: Convert a URL to clean structured text ($0.005)

tools.name: crypto_price
tools.description: Token price with 24h change and market cap ($0.001)

tools.name: parse_rss
tools.description: Parse RSS/Atom feed to structured JSON ($0.002)

tools.name: wallet_balance
tools.description: ETH and USDC balance on Base L2 ($0.001)

tools.name: market_feed
tools.description: Last 10 regulatory events for prediction markets ($0.10)

tools.name: market_events
tools.description: Classified regulatory events by agency ($0.50)

tools.name: market_signal
tools.description: Scored regulatory signal for one market ($2.00)

tools.name: market_signals
tools.description: Bulk scored signals for all markets ($5.00)

tools.name: alpha_report

tools.name: regulatory_changes

tools.name: regulatory_jurisdiction
tools.description: Jurisdiction comparison with cost modeling ($3.00)

tools.name: fed_resolution

tools.name: oracle_chainlink

tools.name: market_resolution

tools.name: tx_status

tools.name: batch_utility

tools.name: extract_url
